description: controller action with inline business logic that belongs in the model
input:
class PostsController < ApplicationController
  def publish
    post = Post.find(params[:id])
    if post.draft? && post.author == current_user
      post.published = true
      post.published_at = Time.current
      post.draft = false
      post.save!
      redirect_to post, notice: 'Published!'
    else
      redirect_to post, alert: 'Cannot publish'
    end
  end
end
